description: Complete the role system for NeighbourGo: Poster, Provider, and Both. Each role gets a tailored home dashboard and profile experience.

userStories.title: Poster Home Dashboard
userStories.description: As a Poster, I want a home screen that shows my active tasks, quick-post button, and recent bid activity so I can manage my requests at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/home/presentation/screens/poster_home_screen.dart
Show a greeting with user displayName
Show a 'Post a Task' primary CTA button that navigates to PostTaskScreen
Show a list of the user's own active tasks (status != completed/cancelled) fetched from Firestore via task_list_provider filtered by posterId == current user uid
Each task card shows title, category, budget, bid count, and createdAt (timeago)
If no tasks, show empty state: '📋 No active tasks. Post your first task!'
flutter analyze passes with no errors

userStories.title: Provider Home Dashboard
userStories.description: As a Provider, I want a home screen that shows available tasks near me and my active bids so I can find work and track my applications.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/home/presentation/screens/provider_home_screen.dart
Show a greeting with user displayName and their avgRating (stars) if stats exist
Show a horizontally scrollable row of the user's serviceCategories as filter chips
Show a list of available tasks from Firestore (status == 'open') ordered by createdAt desc, limit 20
Each task card shows title, category emoji, budget range, neighbourhood, and timeago
Tapping a task card navigates to TaskDetailScreen
If no tasks found, show empty state: '🔍 No open tasks right now. Check back soon!'
flutter analyze passes with no errors

userStories.title: Role-Aware Main Shell Routing
userStories.description: The main shell screen should render the correct home dashboard based on the logged-in user's role.
acceptanceCriteria: Update lib/features/home/presentation/screens/main_shell_screen.dart
Read current user role from auth provider
If role == UserRole.poster: show PosterHomeScreen as the home tab
If role == UserRole.provider: show ProviderHomeScreen as the home tab
If role == UserRole.both: show a TabBar with two tabs: 'Find Help' (PosterHomeScreen) and 'Find Work' (ProviderHomeScreen)
If user is null or role is still loading, show a centered CircularProgressIndicator
flutter analyze passes with no errors

userStories.title: Provider Stats Widget
userStories.description: As a Provider, I want to see my key stats (completed tasks, rating, earnings) in a compact widget on my home screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Create lib/features/profile/presentation/widgets/provider_stats_widget.dart
Show completedTasks, avgRating (1 decimal), and totalReviews from ProviderStats
Show earnings as 'S\$X.XX' (hidden behind a show/hide toggle icon)
If ProviderStats is null, show placeholder dashes '--'
Use the widget inside ProviderHomeScreen below the greeting
flutter analyze passes with no errors

userStories.title: Role Switch in Profile Screen
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change my role from the profile screen so I can switch between poster and provider modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Find or create lib/features/profile/presentation/screens/profile_screen.dart
Add a 'My Role' section that shows the current role as a readable label (e.g., 'Task Poster', 'Service Provider', 'Both')
Add a 'Change Role' button that opens a bottom sheet with the 3 role options (same style as RoleSelectionScreen cards)
On role selection, call authRepository.createOrUpdateUser with the new role and show a SnackBar: 'Role updated!'
The home shell re-renders automatically because it watches the auth provider
flutter analyze passes with no errors
